## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss pricing and packaging strategy for growthx.ai, and align on website content approach.](https://fathom.video/share/S6g6_MDRqjrCiQfsFCoCc-GPJpyAjaw5?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Shift from individual work stream pricing to outcome-based packaging (content, distribution, conversion)](https://fathom.video/share/S6g6_MDRqjrCiQfsFCoCc-GPJpyAjaw5?tab=summary&timestamp=1572.0)
  - [Create a separate page detailing all work streams without specific pricing](https://fathom.video/share/S6g6_MDRqjrCiQfsFCoCc-GPJpyAjaw5?tab=summary&timestamp=1853.0)
  - [Consider adding a high-end advisory service to anchor value perception](https://fathom.video/share/S6g6_MDRqjrCiQfsFCoCc-GPJpyAjaw5?tab=summary&timestamp=3000.0)
  - [Focus on presenting growthx.ai as a strategic partner rather than a traditional agency](https://fathom.video/share/S6g6_MDRqjrCiQfsFCoCc-GPJpyAjaw5?tab=summary&timestamp=1935.0)

## Topics

### Website Content and Structure

  - [Move away from listing 10 different work streams with individual prices](https://fathom.video/share/S6g6_MDRqjrCiQfsFCoCc-GPJpyAjaw5?tab=summary&timestamp=2456.0)
  - [Create a main page with outcome-based packages (content, distribution, conversion)](https://fathom.video/share/S6g6_MDRqjrCiQfsFCoCc-GPJpyAjaw5?tab=summary&timestamp=2502.0)
  - [Develop a separate page detailing all work streams without specific pricing](https://fathom.video/share/S6g6_MDRqjrCiQfsFCoCc-GPJpyAjaw5?tab=summary&timestamp=2479.0)
  - [Consider using Framer for quick website development](https://fathom.video/share/S6g6_MDRqjrCiQfsFCoCc-GPJpyAjaw5?tab=summary&timestamp=457.0)
  - [Aim for transparency in pricing while maintaining some mystery to encourage inquiry](https://fathom.video/share/S6g6_MDRqjrCiQfsFCoCc-GPJpyAjaw5?tab=summary&timestamp=2245.0)

### Pricing and Packaging Strategy

  - [Adopt a model similar to Superside, with clear "included in all plans" features](https://fathom.video/share/S6g6_MDRqjrCiQfsFCoCc-GPJpyAjaw5?tab=summary&timestamp=2365.0)
  - [Implement a range-based pricing model for main packages](https://fathom.video/share/S6g6_MDRqjrCiQfsFCoCc-GPJpyAjaw5?tab=summary&timestamp=2355.0)
  - [Consider adding a high-end advisory service (e.g., $20,000/month) to anchor value perception](https://fathom.video/share/S6g6_MDRqjrCiQfsFCoCc-GPJpyAjaw5?tab=summary&timestamp=3000.0)
  - [Position growthx.ai as a strategic partner offering comprehensive programs rather than individual services](https://fathom.video/share/S6g6_MDRqjrCiQfsFCoCc-GPJpyAjaw5?tab=summary&timestamp=1935.0)

### Work Streams and Services

  - [Reframe work streams as components of larger, outcome-based programs](https://fathom.video/share/S6g6_MDRqjrCiQfsFCoCc-GPJpyAjaw5?tab=summary&timestamp=1851.0)
  - [Potential work streams: lead magnets, newsletters, podcasts, content creation, SEO, product marketing](https://fathom.video/share/S6g6_MDRqjrCiQfsFCoCc-GPJpyAjaw5?tab=summary&timestamp=3320.0)
  - [Consider offering exclusive advisory services with high-profile team members](https://fathom.video/share/S6g6_MDRqjrCiQfsFCoCc-GPJpyAjaw5?tab=summary&timestamp=3054.0)
  - [Explore the idea of creating industry-specific programs (e.g., e-commerce SEO)](https://fathom.video/share/S6g6_MDRqjrCiQfsFCoCc-GPJpyAjaw5?tab=summary&timestamp=3226.0)

### Community and Growth Strategies

  - [Develop an ad-led growth community as a marketing tool and potential revenue stream](https://fathom.video/share/S6g6_MDRqjrCiQfsFCoCc-GPJpyAjaw5?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Consider implementing a tiered approach: free content, paid community, high-end advisory services](https://fathom.video/share/S6g6_MDRqjrCiQfsFCoCc-GPJpyAjaw5?tab=summary&timestamp=3000.0)
  - [Explore the creation of lead magnets, workshops, and other value-add content to drive engagement](https://fathom.video/share/S6g6_MDRqjrCiQfsFCoCc-GPJpyAjaw5?tab=summary&timestamp=2250.0)

### Team and Hiring

  - [Plans to bring on a designer (Christopher) from WorkOS to improve brand and design capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/S6g6_MDRqjrCiQfsFCoCc-GPJpyAjaw5?tab=summary&timestamp=1138.0)
  - [Potential expansion into creative services](https://fathom.video/share/S6g6_MDRqjrCiQfsFCoCc-GPJpyAjaw5?tab=summary&timestamp=1165.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jason to create a draft of the new website structure and content based on the discussion](https://fathom.video/share/S6g6_MDRqjrCiQfsFCoCc-GPJpyAjaw5?tab=summary&timestamp=3535.0)
  - [Explore Framer as a potential tool for quick website development](https://fathom.video/share/S6g6_MDRqjrCiQfsFCoCc-GPJpyAjaw5?tab=summary&timestamp=457.0)
  - [Develop a more detailed breakdown of work streams and how they fit into outcome-based packages](https://fathom.video/share/S6g6_MDRqjrCiQfsFCoCc-GPJpyAjaw5?tab=summary&timestamp=2853.0)
  - [Consider creating an internal docs page with detailed information for qualified leads post-discovery call](https://fathom.video/share/S6g6_MDRqjrCiQfsFCoCc-GPJpyAjaw5?tab=summary&timestamp=3507.0)
  - [Align on final pricing strategy and package structure before website launch](https://fathom.video/share/S6g6_MDRqjrCiQfsFCoCc-GPJpyAjaw5?tab=summary&timestamp=3555.0)
